Built For Performance.

Bot Protection

We blocked $2.3M in fake clicks last month. Stop paying for datacenter and VPN traffic.

Geo Targeting

Send US traffic to Offer A, EU traffic to Offer B. One link. Zero waste.

Deep Analytics

Not just clicks. Real intelligence on OS, browsers, and referrers.

A/B Testing

Let data pick your winner. Not your gut. Auto-route traffic to the highest converting page.

Pixel Protection

Your Meta Pixel is being stolen by bot fires. We stop it and only fire on verified humans.

Bio Pages

For creators who monetize their audience. Drag & drop landing pages in seconds.

Your budget is bleeding.
Stop the bleeding.

If you are running paid ads without protection, click-fraud is eating your budget. Our Ad-Fraud Shield detects and blocks datacenter and VPN traffic instantly.

  • Block AWS, Google Cloud, DigitalOcean IPs
  • Prevent Competitor Scrapers from exhausting budget
  • Keep Pixel Data 100% pure for lookalike audiences

Simple, Scalable Pricing.

Starter

Perfect for testing and personal side projects

$0/mo
  • 5 Smart Links / Mo
  • Basic Click Analytics
  • Elite Bio Page Builder
  • Creator Paywall (Stripe Connect)
  • Monetization: 5% platform fee per sale
  • Static Branding QR Codes
  • Standard SSL Protection

Pro Creator

Maximize ROI with Profit Intelligence

$9/mo
  • Everything in Starter
  • Profit Intelligence Dashboard
  • Auto-Shield (Bot Protection)
  • Revenue Recovery (Language)
  • Verified Custom Domains
  • Advanced Device Targeting
  • Geotargeting (Country Level)
  • Unlimited Smart Links

$19/mo
